projectSummary.name: MD.Piece
projectSummary.overallProgress: Capture and OCR planning package created with docs, API contract, and reference app skeletons

decisions.title: Start with transferable OCR capture assets before locking stack
decisions.selectedOption: Documentation plus Web and Flutter skeletons
decisions.rationale: The repo has no established stack, so a cross-platform first-pass gives faster review and alignment.

roadmap: Choose primary client stack: Web or Flutter
Replace mock capture evaluation with real camera input
Implement OCR backend using the defined API contract
Add end-to-end tests once the production stack is selected
learnings: The workspace started without application code, so foundation assets needed to be created before implementation.
A shared capture state model helps keep Web and Flutter behavior aligned.
The GitHub remote already exists and should be integrated through a branch workflow instead of rewriting main.

implementationState.lastCompletedTask: Created OCR capture documentation and reference implementation skeletons
implementationState.currentTask: Push review branch with OCR planning package
pendingTasks: Implement document edge detection and image preprocessing
Wire the OCR API to a real service

contextNotes: Project "MD.Piece" created with SYNAPTIC Protocol v3.0
OCR capture planning assets added on 2026-04-15
